comment.body: Trader you asked me yesterday why i thought 10% further to go.... The answer is the $, it is under pressure and Trump and Friends want it lower to help with trade deficit. Now 17% of US market is owned by foreigners, they are taking stock loses and currency loses. Notice How we starting to  get a sell off overnight. The market is driven by around $50-$70B of trades every day. Well if foreigners halve there ownership of US equities that is $4.5T.... thats going to take 4 months or so.... so when we get our oversold rally....dont expect it to last IMO
